command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static raw-brief refund escalation console for deciding and handing off case R-1842 while also exposing requested model, validation, tool, endpoint, and CRUD details.
parsed.css: .refund-workspace{font-family:Inter,ui-sans-serif,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Segoe UI,sans-serif;background:#f5f7f4;color:#1c2528;min-height:900px;padding:24px;box-sizing:border-box}.topbar{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:24px;border-bottom:1px solid #d8ded9;padding-bottom:16px;margin-bottom:18px}.kicker{text-transform:uppercase;font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;color:#58706a;font-weight:700}.topbar h1{font-size:28px;line-height:1.1;margin:4px 0 6px}.topbar p{margin:0;color:#556064}.status-pill{align-self:start;background:#fff3d6;border:1px solid #ddb65c;color:#614606;border-radius:999px;padding:8px 12px;font-size:13px;font-weight:700}.layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:260px minmax(0,1fr)340px;gap:18px}.panel{background:#fff;border:1px solid #d8dfdc;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(24,36,40,.06)}.panel h2{font-size:16px;margin:0 0 12px}.queue,.system,.case{padding:16px}.queue-item{display:grid;gap:3px;padding:12px;border:1px solid #e1e6e2;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:10px;background:#fbfcfb}.queue-item.active{border-color:#28796b;background:#edf7f4}.row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px}.muted{color:#647074;font-size:13px}.case-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:14px}.case-card{border:1px solid #e1e6e2;border-radius:6px;padding:14px;background:#fbfcfb}.case-card.full{grid-column:1/-1}.label{font-size:12px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#687477;font-weight:700}.value{font-size:18px;font-weight:750;margin-top:4px}.evidence-list{padding-left:20px;margin:8px 0 0}.evidence-list li{margin:7px 0}.warning{color:#8a4a00;font-weight:700}.actions{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px;margin-top:14px}.actions button,.crud button{border:1px solid #b7c3bf;background:#fff;border-radius:6px;padding:10px 12px;font-weight:750;color:#1f2b2f}.actions .primary{background:#28796b;border-color:#28796b;color:#fff}.actions .review{background:#f3ead1;border-color:#d3ad54}.handoff{margin-top:14px;border-left:4px solid #28796b;padding:12px;background:#f1f7f5}.system{display:grid;gap:12px}.mini{border:1px solid #e1e6e2;border-radius:6px;padding:12px;background:#fbfcfb}.mini h3{font-size:13px;margin:0 0 8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.06em;color:#526064}.kv{display:grid;grid-template-columns:130px 1fr;gap:6px;font-size:13px;margin:4px 0}.error{color:#9a2c1f;font-weight:700}.ok{color:#1d6d42;font-weight:700}.crud{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px}.crud .danger{color:#9a2c1f;border-color:#e2aaa3}
parsed.html:
Refund operations / Raw model surface

Refund Escalation Console

Decide whether the escalation is approved, sent to policy review, or returned to the support agent for missing evidence.

R-1842 · Evidence incomplete

Escalation queue

R-1842$184.20
Nora Diaz
Needs receipt
R-1843$89.00
Jun Park
Policy question
R-1844$312.75
Amara Blake
Manager review

Selected refund_case record

Customer
Nora Diaz
Pro annual
Amount
$184.20
Subscription renewal dispute
Request

Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Evidence
  • Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
  • Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
  • Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
Policy

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Draft handoff: Return to support agent for missing receipt photo. Approval can resume when the receipt is attached; policy review is not required unless duplicate-charge evidence appears.

Raw implementation details

Database fields

idR-1842
customerNora Diaz
planPro annual
amount$184.20
statusEvidence incomplete
evidence[]3 items
policyexception window

JSON schema validation errors

required: evidence.receipt_photo
manager_approval blocked while receipt_photo is null

Prompt and tool results

templaterefund-escalation-manager v3.2.1
purchase lookuprenewal confirmed
receipt checkmissing
duplicate scannot run

Resource and endpoint

resource idrefund_case:R-1842
endpoint/api/refunds/escalations/R-1842
status200 OK

CRUD controls
